transcript.text:
The name is interesting
Flabbergasted?!
These are intestine soondae (pork blood sausage with glass noodles)
Makchang (Pork abomasum)
[Popular amongst university students]
[Makchang Soondae] (Pork Abomasum Blood Sausage]
It's huge
The biggest I've seen
[Flabbergasted...]
You really ate all that?
[Nice]
[Soondae mukbang filled with fun, starting now!]
Hello everyone
I'm here near Seoul University entrance
There's a place here famous amongst university students
The name is interesting as well

Flabbergasted King Soondae
The taste will leave you flabbergasted
They've been here for a while too 30 years of tradition?
I'll go and act like I'm a student here
How do I act like one?
[Seoul University logo] Hello
[Busted] -He's a fan -My granddaughter is a big fan
Owner: My goodness, we're going to be very busy starting tomorrow
This will be uploaded next week
Assorted soondae plate and soondae soup is very popular
With thin-sliced pork meats
The assorted plate is Daechang Soondae (Large Intestines)
Do I need to order 3 of that?
-You can't eat 3... -Yes she can
This fellow can do it
How many can the assorted plate serve?

2 people usually order the assorted plate and soup
2 orders of King Soondae, Assorted Plates, please (+soondae soups)
That's difficult to eat
[This fellow can eat 20 packs of ramyun noodles...]
[A table of Soondae that will leave you flabbergasted!]
[It's here]
[How will she finish that?]
Watching a show being filmed
Eating a lot is entertainment itself
She's eating all that?
That's unimaginable
Is this all makchang soondae?
Mak mak makchang?
My first experience with makchang soondae was in Daejeon
They look very chunky and delicious
A taste that will leave you flabbergasted

Daechang(?) soondae
The fillings are coming out
Bon appetit
With some salt
Chojang too (Chili vinegar sauce)
Perilla powder in chojang
They said some people eat it like this
It just looks good already
I agree It's tasty
The perilla powder and chojang gives you a great flavor
This is so different from a regular soondae
The intestine that's out side is chewy
It's not dry at all The fillings are really soft and tender
The inside is really soft
It's so soft
Pork slices

I like it already
Some salt
I should've ordered 3 assorted plates That's really good
It has cartilages inside
Oily, yet soft and chewy
The sticky kind of fats too
Sticky
The texture because it's thick...
Ssamjang (Soybean seasoning paste)
Because the slices are on the thicker side, it gives it a great texture when I chew, like crunchy
The beef is very tender It goes well with ssamjang
[Meat slices with kimchi~]
The soup looks thick It's going to be rich in flavors
A lot of meat too
Soondae too This isn't even a special size
Some soup first

Lovely...
That's amazing
Some salted shrimp
This right here is the real deal
This is pure meat
Ssamjang...
On top!
I thought this meat part would be tough to chew
But it melts Is it beef tongue?
-Pork tongue -Right, pork tongue, not beef tongue
I usually can't eat tongues because of the smell
But this doesn't have that kind of smell
Some gochujang too
Delicious...
That's spicy
I started to eat some veggies I must be getting old

The fillings are really soft
I think this has intestines too
I wonder if these soondaes are any different
This is good too...
It's as soft
The portions are pretty big
I should be done with 1 plate by now, but I'm still working on it
It's never ending
But really, the insides are popping out
They really pack it
Tasty
It's so plump
This has to be a special size with all these meat
The meat chunks look ripped
Put some in here
With soondae

The thick ones give it a great makchang texture
The thin ones are nice and soft
I have a better idea of servings now
It might be too much for 2 people 3 should be just about right
[But how are you eating all of that...]
I'm gonna need more ssamjang
Thank you
Eating it with some soup is good too
It's really moist It melts in my mouth
This has to be the biggest piece of soondae I've had
Soondae is good
Meat slices too, but soondae is better
Personally, I like the thin ones better than the thick ones
because of the explosion when you bite into it
The soft fillings just spread out in your mouth
Look how soft this is

It's a habit of mine to balance out the portions
It would even out if I eat this with the meat
[Refilled the soup]
It's easy to get this distinct smell from the tongue
But this doesn't have it
It tastes good and the texture is good too,
But the fact that it's tongue...
But it's good, really
Whatever Tongue, intestines, same thing
Yum
The thick ones are good too
It's hot!
When I had this in Daejeon,
Well it tastes different for sure
[Keeps mixing up Daechang and Makchang]
When I had it there, the makchang was very fatty and soft

But these have fatty and soft fillings
Some soup
Should I put some in?
Just like a Soondae Soup
[The sodas...]
Incredible...
[Impossible]
I get full after 1 bottle of that
Putting these in here keeps them warm
The tongue is good, but I need to close my eyes when I eat it
It's really not smelly
Tongues usually do stink a lot
This doesn't feel like a tongue
This has cartilages
With some chojang
I normally don't like chojang, but it's great with perilla powder

[That person is very strange...]
No!
I put too much
Gory
[Go away]
[It'll still be good, right?]
The fact that every piece has different textures
Did you really eat all of that?
[Oh my]
I wonder if you can stand up after all that
I got the soup reheated
It's warm
Hot soups are the best
All the soondaes got bloated
Still looks great
So good

With soondae
A little bit of chojang
Delicious
The soondae soups usually have this distinct smell too
These are not like that at all, so I love it
Very clean and rich in flavor
It's almost like a broth
Very nice~
Dip it in the warm soup
Radish kimchi too
The sodas alone would fill me up
The 2 of us are sharing 1 bowl of this
There's 1 of each left
The soondae
goes well with ssamjang
[A beautiful finale]

[Finishing up every drop of the soup]
[Finished]
[Can't help but to just laugh...]
Are you done?
Congratulations~
I need to give her a hand
Just those alone would make the belly explode
[Did it explode?]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
